goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'theatre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should be in the 'east'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of theatre
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should be in the east
The hotel should be in the type of hotel
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get star of the hotel
